message: There was a noise.
It was in the way.
An unnecessary existence.
Something that should be removed.
It is.
But,
If your position changes, that too,
Changes.
A difference in perspective.
What sounds like plain noise to one person could be a revelation to another.
In the year 1964, two researchers doing experiments in communication technologies discovered a certain noise.
The unexplainable noise vexed the two researchers, so they attempted to rule out every possible source of the noise.
Every possible source of interference, from the din of traffic to plain old bird shit on the antenna.
Even after removing all possible interference, the noise wouldn't go away.
Later, they realized the noise being recorded had its source in the genesis of the universe.
It became clear that this radiation was left over from the Big Bang.
They won the Nobel Prize for their discovery.
A simple noise brought them glory.
Humanity gained new scientific knowledge because they noticed a noise.
If the position changes,
If the observer changes,
A simple noise can be the calling to a whole new world.
"I see. So that's how it is."
"The location of the soul. The model of a samsaric world."
"Three shadows on the wall, shadow puppets accelerating into oblivion."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why, you..."
"I have a name, you know."

name: Tomosane
message: "Who are you?"
"Who?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Tell me, who are you?"
"I'm not anyone. I'm only watching an unending armilla from afar."

name: Tomosane
message: "An unending armilla?"
"A model of time. How amusing. All within it are mere toys and souls to be played with."

name: Tomosane
message: "That voice... You're..."

name: Ayana
message: "Hello, Mamiya-kun. I am Ayana. Who are you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm Mamiya Takuji."

name: Ayana
message: "Mamiya Takuji? That's a lie. Mamiya-kun is taking a little nap right now, you see. I made sure of that."
What a bizarre response.
I look like Mamiya Takuji to normal people.
But the person standing before me had realized I wasn't Mamiya Takuji.
And she just said he was taking... a nap?
I could tell she wasn't a normal schoolgirl.

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm Yuuki Tomosane, and you're..."
Someone from a class in this school.
I'm not sure, though.

name: Tomosane
message: "One of Minakami Yuki's acquaintances..."
I didn't know her myself, but memories of this girl were engraved in my hippocampus from Yuki's experiences.

name: Ayana
message: "Yes, and I'm acquainted with Mamiya-kun as well. Not to mention one other person."
She pointed at me.

name: Tomosane
message: "We just met. I wouldn't say we're acquainted... And more importantly, why are you here?"

name: Ayana
message: "Hehe, Mamiya-kun called for me."

name: Tomosane
message: "He called for you?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yeah, I was just playing on the water tank, and Mamiya-kun came looking for me. That's why I'm here."
Why would she be playing on the water tank in the middle of the night? I was a bit curious about that, but it didn't really matter to me.

name: Tomosane
message: "So he was looking for you... What then?"

name: Ayana
message: "We talked. Mamiya-kun tried to touch my soul, and he broke."
An even stranger response.
Normally, I would just think she was a bit of a mysterious girl, but...
But, somehow...
I got the feeling that this girl wasn't normal.
But that's why...

name: Tomosane
message: "All right. So there was a gap in his consciousness because he tried to touch your soul. What happened to Mamiya Takuji after that?"

name: Ayana
message: "Isn't Mamiya Takuji always with you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "But he's not here right now."

name: Ayana
message: "That's because you came here with a strong determination... Right?"
I came with a strong determination...
Me?

name: Tomosane
message: "You said he broke, but should I take that to mean that Mamiya Takuji's consciousness was fractured?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes, there was a small fracture in Mamiya-kun's sense of self. You pushed through that fracture to get here."

name: Tomosane
message: "I pushed his consciousness aside..."

name: Ayana
message: "Yes, which was quite the surprise indeed. The body you're inhabiting right now is almost entirely under Mamiya's control."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, so you were surprised that I came out..."
Maybe it was surprising, but...
But... I at least wasn't surprised that it happened.
That's right. I had a feeling this would happen.
Waking up at the final battle with Mamiya Takuji... Being completely unable to find my consciousness in this world for even a moment before the battle...
That's what Yuki said would happen.
But...

name: Ayana
message: "You had a premonition."

name: Tomosane
message: "...Yeah."
Somehow, I knew I would wake up again.
Why?

name: Ayana
message: "Whereof one cannot speak, thereof one must be silent. You should not peer lightly into the abyss. I would call that foolhardy, not brave."

name: Tomosane
message: "What do you mean?"

name: Ayana
message: "More importantly, there's something important to you in this world, right? That's what anchored your consciousness to this world."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah..."
That's right. This girl's ramblings aren't important right now.
The most important thing right now...
The reason why I fought to reclaim a moment of consciousness...

name: Ayana
message: "Hehehe, at least you're honest. That's a good boy."

name: Tomosane
message: "Anyway, you said your name was Ayana? You have my thanks."

name: Ayana
message: "Why?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I don't really understand, but you're the one who did this, right?"

name: Ayana
message: "I don't understand either."
I didn't know the reason.
The only thing I knew for sure was that Mamiya Takuji tried to come in contact with her, and then he lost consciousness.
Doubts still filled my mind.
If Mamiya Takuji's soul was fractured by coming in contact with this girl...
That meant she was capable of interacting with our souls, just like the three of us can.
That's the same thing as sharing the same body with us, but...

name: Ayana
message: "I don't share your body."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah..."
And she could even read my mind.
But right now...

name: Tomosane
message: "When will Mamiya Takuji's soul return?"
And when it does, what will happen to me?

name: Ayana
message: "Don't worry about him. He won't be coming back for quite a while. Probably not until just before dawn."

name: Tomosane
message: "Just before dawn?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes, he won't return until then. Just before the sun rises. You are the ruler of that body until the sky glows orange again. But..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Once it does glow orange, he will return."
So that's it...
I looked at the time.
It was the 17th, at 10:30 p.m.
Hasaki had already returned home...
Dawn would be after 4:30 a.m, so I just had to get home before then.
If I hurried, I could make it in time.

name: Tomosane
message: "Whoa!"

name: Ayana
message: "What?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-Why are you following me?"

name: Ayana
message: "I'm going home too. I guess we're going the same way."

name: Tomosane
message: "No, we're not. You followed me down from the rooftop."

name: Ayana
message: "Oh, but... you should be careful on your way home."

name: Tomosane
message: "On my way home?"
The road home...
That's right.
I could tell something happened while I was unconscious.
I learned how to control my lucid dreams, so I could perceive some of the things that Mamiya experienced.
I wasn't as good as Yuki, so I didn't know the exact details, but I felt pretty sure that I was in a dangerous situation.
Even if I didn't know the details, I was pretty sure there were people looking for me (at least here in the school).
So I had to be careful in picking my route home.
All right...

name: Tomosane
message: "Thanks for the advice. I'll take it to heart... Wait, what?"
I was just lost in thought for a moment, and she disappeared when I averted my gaze.
When I looked again, there was no one there.

name: Tomosane
message: "Ayana..."
I didn't even hear her footsteps.
It was like she had just vanished into thin air.
But more importantly, I had something I needed to do.

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa, haa, haa..."
I went into the sewers through the old pool's entrance.
When I was in the water storage tank, I thought I heard someone, but I was careful not to let them hear me.
I just needed to get back home.
I wanted to go through the sewers into the irrigation canal, and then out through the hole in the fence.
I took the fire escape down from the third story, then cut across the courtyard, climbed down the manhole, and then went through the sewers and the irrigation canal.
I knew I couldn't just walk out the front gate today.

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm a wanted man, apparently, and these guys know what they're doing."
I took the ladder out of the irrigation canal and came out on the street I normally walked down to get to and from school.
It didn't look like anyone was watching this route.
I didn't feel any eyes on me.

name: Tomosane
message: "The train should still be running at this time of night."
I had plenty of time to get home.
Hasaki...
I began to run.
If I ran to Suginomiya and got on a train, I could get home before Hasaki went to sleep.
My final battle would be tomorrow, just before dawn.
I had to see her before the sun rises.
There was still something I had to do.

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa, haa, haa..."
Why are all the lights off? Is she sleeping already?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Crap!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki!"
There was no answer.
I didn't even hear the echo of my own voice.
It was like my voice had been absorbed by the thick black curtain of darkness that covered the room.

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki! Hasaki, are you there?"
I yelled for her over and over.
There was no answer.

name: Tomosane
message: "Is she gone? Hasaki!"
I searched the entire house.
I looked in her room first, and then I searched my room, the study, and all the empty rooms.
The bathroom, the bathtub... She would've yelled at me if she was in the bath, but I wasn't worried about that.

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki!"
Hasaki was gone.
She wasn't anywhere I looked.
That's strange. Why isn't she home?
Maybe she's at our mother's apartment?
No, there's no way she would stay there late at night.

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki!"
Why?
Why isn't Hasaki here?
Did Mamiya Takuji take her?

name: Tomosane
message: "No, it's probably..."
That's not it.
I really hope that's not it.
If Mamiya Takuji tried to do something to Hasaki, there would definitely cause a disturbance in my consciousness. There would be some kind of disturbance or signal that I could feel.
Thanks to Yuki's training, I could feel fragments of Mamiya's perceptions in the world of our subconscious.
I would have definitely felt something if he had hurt Hasaki.
Which means Mamiya Takuji hasn't done anything to Hasaki.
I think...

name: Tomosane
message: "Then why isn't Hasaki here? Hasaki is gone..."
"Huh? Is that you, Tomosane-kun?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Ah!"
I instantly reacted to the voice behind me.
I shouldn't have let my guard down, even if I was in my own house.
I can't believe I let someone sneak up on me. If he hadn't called out, I would've been done for.

name: Tomosane
message: "Who are you?!"
"Wh-Whoa! Wait, wait!"

name: Kimura
message: "Ahahahaha, good evening."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-Why, you!"

name: Kimura
message: "Um... You're Yuuki Tomosane-kun right now, aren't you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "How do you know my name? And why are you in my house?!"

name: Kimura
message: "Whoa, w-wait a second. You're looking for Hasaki-chan, aren't you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Did you take her?!"

name: Kimura
message: "Wh-Why would I do that? W-Wait just a second, ah, ahh."

name: Tomosane
message: "Tell me! What did you do to Hasaki?!"

name: Kimura
message: "Ah, ahh..."

name: Kimura
message: "Th-There's a light at the end of the tunnel..."

name: Kimura
message: "H-How rude! You nearly killed me!"

name: Tomosane
message: "S-Sorry... You suddenly popped up behind me. Besides, I'm allowed to defend myself against intruders in my home."

name: Kimura
message: "I guess you do, but I have permission. Look, I have a key."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why do you have a house key? Did you―"

name: Kimura
message: "No, no, Hasaki-chan asked me to wait here. She wanted me to tell her if you came back."

name: Tomosane
message: "Me?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah, Hasaki-chan said she didn't really want to come back to this house."

name: Tomosane
message: "She doesn't? Hasaki said that?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah. I think she said something like, 'There's no one left in this house who knows me.'"

name: Tomosane
message: "Kimura... You seem to know my, well, our secret."

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah, you have multiple personality disorder, right? I could hardly believe it at first. I thought only real nutcases had that."

name: Tomosane
message: "So where is Hasaki right now?"

name: Kimura
message: "She's at Hakushuukyou bar. The place where she works."

name: Tomosane
message: "At Hakushuukyou?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah, I guess she's been staying there the past few nights. Master is protecting her."

name: Tomosane
message: "Master is?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah. He was your teacher, right? I heard he was an instructor in an ancient style of martial arts, so if anyone can keep her safe, it's that person, right? It seems like the right decision to me."

name: Tomosane
message: "I see. So she was at the shop..."

name: Kimura
message: "She was really down, too. She said the only personalities left were Mamiya Takuji and a new personality, right?"

name: Kimura
message: "A new personality... Minakami Yuki-san, I think?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I guess so..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wait. How do you know all of that?"

name: Kimura
message: "Hasaki-chan trusts me."

name: Tomosane
message: "Damn it, Hasaki... This guy is just a shady reporter."

name: Kimura
message: "What? How am I shady?"

name: Tomosane
message: "How are you not shady? Every time I see you, I wonder if you're going to get arrested today."

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, I've had a few run-ins with the police."
So he has... I'm surprised he's still working this job.

name: Kimura
message: "But I'm not a bad person, you know? The Master at Hakushuukyou always consoles me, telling me I'm a real journalist."

name: Tomosane
message: "That means he wants your precious little boy hole."

name: Kimura
message: "Huh? Seriously?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Either that, or he just wants to cheer you up so you'll spend some money."

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, that might be it."

name: Tomosane
message: "You're always interacting with the target of your investigations. Shouldn't you be hiding and watching, or something like that?"

name: Kimura
message: "The target of my investigations is Mamiya Takuji. I'm pretty sure he doesn't know about me."

name: Tomosane
message: "Mamiya Takuji is your target?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah, I'm not interested in you or Minakami Yuki-san. The one I'm interested in is Mamiya Takuji."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why?"

name: Kimura
message: "You really don't know? I see. So you really aren't aware of what's happening when the other personalities are in control."

name: Tomosane
message: "No, I know a little bit about it. Mamiya Takuji is using the Internet to spread fear... And he's gathering people."

name: Kimura
message: "Huh? You know about it? I thought you didn't know anything about the times when you were unconscious?"

name: Tomosane
message: "That was true before. Things have changed, and now I can tell a bit about what he's doing."

name: Kimura
message: "Really? Th-Then there's a lot I need to ask you. Like, on the night of the 15th, he called Akasaka Megu and Kitami Satoko to the site of the suicide, right?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I told you, I only know a little bit. I don't know any details. Only the big picture."

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, really... That's too bad."

name: Tomosane
message: "More importantly... You're still following me, huh?"

name: Kimura
message: "Of course. I was investigating the use of drugs among the youth, but then one of my leads died in an accident, and then a girl from that same school participated in a group suicide."

name: Kimura
message: "And then the teacher fell and died too! If I didn't investigate this, I wouldn't be a journalist."

name: Tomosane
message: "A journalist, huh? It's just a shitty, third-rate paper, isn't it?"

name: Kimura
message: "Journalism is all about perseverance in the face of adversity. Maybe it's not a big national paper, but it's not third-rate, either."

name: Tomosane
message: "Well, that's a wonderful philosophy you have there, but I don't care."

name: Kimura
message: "So anyway, I can't meet Mamiya Takuji himself, but I have met the other personality... The new one."

name: Kimura
message: "Or maybe I should say I saw her? The one named Minakami Yuki-san, that is."

name: Tomosane
message: "How do you know you met her? We all look the same to you."

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah, the difference is pretty subtle. I would never guess you had multiple personalities if I hadn't been told. I'm surprised how good you guys are at camouflaging your three different personalities."

name: Kimura
message: "At first, I imagined that your voice, your attitude, and your choice of words would all change when your personality changed."

name: Tomosane
message: "But our choice of words does change, doesn't it?"

name: Kimura
message: "I guess so, but even I use different words in different circumstances. I might say 'Excuse me.' to a stranger, but I would say 'I'm terribly sorry, Sir!' to my boss."

name: Kimura
message: "And someone's personality can vary too, depending on whether they're happy or sad, cheerful or depressed. It's really strange when you think about it."

name: Tomosane
message: "What is?"

name: Kimura
message: "It's just something I thought about when I was watching you. You have multiple personalities, but the changes I could see were just normal things that could apply to anyone."

name: Kimura
message: "How can we be so sure that there's only one personality inside all the other people we know?"

name: Kimura
message: "Having the same body isn't the same as having the same soul. And even someone's body can look completely different depending on the circumstances, right?"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's why we say a person is 'nicer than he looks on the outside' or 'that person has changed.'"

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah, we never know what someone's like on the inside. All those phrases exist because we believe the person we're talking to is just one, single person."

name: Tomosane
message: "Um, I don't have time to sit around and talk with you. It's really important that I see Hasaki."

name: Tomosane
message: "Let me thank you for the information, at least. I won't waste any more of your time."
I ran to the entranceway.

name: Kimura
message: "W-Wait a second."

name: Tomosane
message: "Shut up. I told you I don't have time to talk to you. The last train is leaving soon."

name: Kimura
message: "The last train? You won't make it in time, even if you sprint the whole way."

name: Tomosane
message: "Well, that's too bad! Now get out of my way!"

name: Kimura
message: "W-Wait!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Shut up! I don't have time!"

name: Kimura
message: "Hold on. I have a car. I can drive you over to the bar in Suginomiya."

name: Tomosane
message: "A car?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah, besides, Hasaki told me to bring you over if you showed up. You don't need to worry about the train."

name: Tomosane
message: "O-Oh, okay."
What's going on?
I didn't expect that at all.
I was riding in that shady journalist's, Kimura's, car.
Apparently, this Kimura guy was pretty well acquainted with Hasaki and Master.
Somehow, that happened without me knowing about it at all.
But maybe I should've expected that.
I had a vague sense of Mamiya Takuji and Minakami Yuki's experiences, but I didn't have a clue what was going on otherwise.
I had no idea what Hasaki had been doing the past few days.
I was just glad...
I was glad to hear that she was safe.
I opened the bar's distinctive, heavy door.
How long has it been?
It hadn't been that long.
But it felt nostalgic, like I hadn't been there in months.

name: Tomosane
message: "Good evening. Is Hasaki here?"

name: Master
message: "O-Oh?"

name: Kimura
message: "Hello... It's me, Kimura."

name: Master
message: "Oh, does that mean..."

name: Hasaki
message: "T-Tomo Nii-san?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah... It's me, Tomosane."

name: Hasaki
message: "Uwaaaah!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-Whoa, Hasaki."

name: Hasaki
message: "I thought I would never see you again. I was so sure. Things were just getting crazier and crazier with Takuji Nii-san."

name: Tomosane
message: "Crazy, huh? I guess so..."

name: Hasaki
message: "You probably don't know what's been happening, but a lot of people have been dying and going missing."

name: Tomosane
message: "No, I can follow the traces of his memory. I do share the same brain with that bastard, for what it's worth."

name: Master
message: "Huh? You can do that?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I learned how to do it just recently. I got a bit of training."

name: Master
message: "Hmm, and it seems like you've grown up a bit since I last saw you. Something's changed, for sure. Did something happen?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Nothing in particular, really. After Mamiya Takuji beat me up, I spent a lot of time wandering through a dream."

name: Master
message: "A dream?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah. I met Yuki for a little while."

name: Master
message: "Yuki? Oh, I see. Hmm..."

name: Tomosane
message: "What?"
Master gave me a knowing smile.

name: Master
message: "Hahahaha, I can still see a bit of her in you."

name: Tomosane
message: "Who?"

name: Master
message: "Oh, nothing. I'm just talking to myself. Besides, don't you need to talk to Hasaki-chan about something?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yes."

name: Master
message: "Weren't you in a rush? Go right ahead."

name: Tomosane
message: "All right."

name: Master
message: "Hm?"

name: Tomosane
message: "But first... Master!"

name: Master
message: "What?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Please step outside!"

name: Master
message: "Outside? What, you want to talk to me alone?"

name: Tomosane
message: "No. I'm telling you to step outside with me!"

name: Master
message: "Huh?"

name: Master
message: "You want to hook up?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "No! I'm telling you to step your ass outside!"

name: Master
message: "Hehehe... What's wrong? This is rare from you."

name: Tomosane
message: "It's not just rare. It's the first time... Asking your instructor to step outside is like suicide."

name: Master
message: "But you're still saying it?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yes... Please."

name: Master
message: "All right."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? Tomo Nii-san?"

name: Tomosane
message: "The truth is, I came home just to tell you one thing, but there's something I have to confirm before I can say it."

name: Hasaki
message: "U-Um, Tomo Nii-san..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I had a dream..."

name: Hasaki
message: "A dream?"

name: Master
message: "That's what you said earlier. You met Yuki, right?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yes, I met Yuki, and she taught me how to control my dreams."

name: Master
message: "Controlling your dreams, huh? Like a lucid dream?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You know about it?"

name: Master
message: "Yeah, that state of mind is often used in the world of martial arts."

name: Tomosane
message: "Is it? Then I definitely need to ask you something, so please step outside."

name: Master
message: "Jeez, is that the hip new catchphrase that all the fresh meat are saying?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Please don't call me fresh meat. That's disgusting."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? Wh-What?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Master? Tomo Nii-san?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Just give us a moment."

name: Hasaki
message: "B-But I haven't seen you in so long..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't worry about me. I'll be right back."
The location was... the roof of the bar.
It wasn't very big.
But it was still a lot bigger than the inside of a dojo.
Though not nearly as big as the school's rooftop.

name: Master
message: "Let me ask you this first. Why did you learn to fight?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm not really sure myself. Mamiya Takuji learned it, and that's how I met you."

name: Master
message: "That's not what I mean. Why did you continue to train?"

name: Master
message: "Yuki and Takuji-kun didn't keep training, at least. You're the only one who continued to train under me."

name: Tomosane
message: "I don't know for sure."

name: Master
message: "Then let me change the question... Why are you standing before me now?"

name: Master
message: "This is the last of the time you have left, isn't it? Why aren't you spending it with Hasaki-chan?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Because..."
The last of the time I have left...
No one told him this was the end. He must've figured it out when he saw my expression.
Why didn't I spend the last time I had left with Hasaki-chan instead?

name: Tomosane
message: "One reason is... because I have to surpass my instructor."

name: Master
message: "Hehehehe... You're awfully confident. Don't you know how much stronger than you I am?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yes. I doubt I could win one match out of a hundred against you. That's what I truly believe."

name: Tomosane
message: "You're a lot stronger than me, you're much more skilled, and you have far more experience, too."

name: Master
message: "But you said you were going to surpass me, didn't you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yes... That's my first goal."

name: Master
message: "Why is that?"

name: Tomosane
message: "So that I can be with Hasaki forever."

name: Tomosane
message: "So that I can protect Hasaki from now on."

name: Master
message: "From now on? Forever?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yes, for the rest of my life."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's why I have to make the impossible possible. I have to fight a battle that I have no chance of winning."

name: Master
message: "A battle you can't win, huh?"
My battle with Mamiya Takuji.
Certainly, I had no chance of winning that battle.
